ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pension_funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pension fund manager */,
  "fund_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the pension fund manager */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the pension fund manager */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the pension fund was established */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Unique registration number for the pension fund */,
  "contact_details" TEXT /* Additional contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the fund manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fund manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the fund manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pension_schemes" (
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pension scheme */,
  "scheme_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the pension scheme */,
  "scheme_name" TEXT /* Name of the pension scheme */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pension fund manager managing the scheme */,
  "tier" TEXT /* Tier of the pension scheme (e.g., Tier I, Tier II) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the pension scheme (e.g., Central Govt, State Govt) */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the pension scheme was launched */,
  "minimum_investment" REAL /* Minimum investment required for the scheme */,
  "investment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of investments allowed (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment (e.g., lump sum, systematic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scheme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pension_schemes_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES pension_funds ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pension_schemes_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES scheme_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheme_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheme_valuations" (
  "valuation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each valuation entry */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pension scheme being valued */,
  "valuation_date" TEXT /* Date of the valuation */,
  "net_asset_value" REAL /* Net asset value (NAV) of the pension scheme on the given date */,
  "valuation_type" TEXT /* Type of valuation (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "valuation_method" TEXT /* Method used for valuation (e.g., NAV, market value) */,
  "valuation_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of valuations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("valuation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheme_valuations_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES pension_schemes ("scheme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheme_valuations_valuation_method FOREIGN KEY ("valuation_method") REFERENCES valuation_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "valuation_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fund manager, government official, auditor) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password_reset_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last reset their password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pension scheme being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the scheme */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the scheme was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the scheme (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the scheme (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES pension_schemes ("scheme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheme_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pension scheme being evaluated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., ROI, YTD Return) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the performance metric */,
  "benchmark_value" REAL /* Benchmark value for the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheme_performance_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES pension_schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheme_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical change entry */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pension scheme being tracked */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., NAV update, scheme name change) */,
  "previous_value" REAL /* Previous value before the change */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New value after the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change in the pension scheme */,
  "change_approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheme_history_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES pension_schemes ("scheme_id")
)
